skills.name: Throw Sand
skills.description: Throw sand at your enemy's eyes. Attacked targets become silenced and blinded and have their accuracy and evasion reduced.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Blind] Duration: 10 seconds
Blinded Enemies: -20% accuracy and evasion
[Silence] Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Brick Smash
skills.description: Smash bricks onto nearby enemies with a chance of stunning them. Critical rate of enemies used to break the brick decreases for 20 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Stun for 3 seconds by 30% chance
Critical Rate: - CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Mangle
skills.description: Continuously slash with your dagger to lacerate enemies in front of you. Enemies hit by Mangle are afflicted with [Fright] for 10 seconds and damage given to user will decrease by 7% per stack.(Maximum 3 stacks)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 9
Discover more
Handbags & Purses
Doll
Maps
AoE Attack Ratio: + SkillSR
50% damage against targets under [Stun], [Blind] and [Bleeding]

skills.name: Blindfire
skills.description: Fire blindly into a group of enemies in your way.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 8
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
2x Critical Rate against enemies under [Stun], [Blind] or [Bleeding]

skills.name: Bully
skills.description: Use your street smarts and vast combat experience to increase your evasion. Evading an enemy attack during Bully increases the enemy's threat values.
skills.effect_text:
Evasion: + CaptionRatio %
Threat: CaptionRatio2
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Aggress
skills.description: Provoke the enemy into a quarrel, making them recognize you as their first target. Evasion of enemies in quarrel decreases.
skills.effect_text:
Threatened Targets: CaptionRatio
Evasion: - CaptionRatio2 %
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Rampage
skills.description: Release all your pent-up aggression and go on a full rampage, destroying everything around you. Dodge enemy attacks, except for the attacks that cannot be dodged for a second. Attacks to stunned, blinded and bleeding enemies deal less damage but apply as two consecutive hits. After Rampage, a buff is applied that increases the damage you deal and receive. During this buff, you cannot evade enemy damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 9
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Effects to stunned, blinded or bleeding enemies:
- Damage -30%
- Applies 2 hits
Post-Rampage Buff Duration: 5 seconds
Damage Dealt w/ Buff: +50%
Damage Taken w/ Buff: +50%

attributes.name: Throw Sand: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Throw Sand] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Throw Sand: 17 Versus 1
attributes.description:
* Changes the AoE attack ratio of [Throw Sand] to 17

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Brick Smash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Brick Smash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Mangle: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Mangle] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Mangle: Knife Artist
attributes.description:
* Evade all enemy attacks during [Mangle] except for inevitable attacks

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Mangle: Skilled Knife
attributes.description:
* Increases [Mangle]'s number of hits by 3

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Blindfire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Blindfire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Blindfire: Bullet Artist
attributes.description:
* Evade all enemy attacks during [Blindfire] except for unevadable attacks

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Blindfire: Skilled Gunman
attributes.description:
* Increases [Blindfire]'s damage by 30% when a critical attack lands

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Bully: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the threat values increased by [Bully] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Bully: Endless Torment
attributes.description:
* Increases [Bully]'s duration by 1 second per attribute level every time you successfully evade while using the skill

* Applies to monster attacks only

attributes.name: Aggress: Unhinged
attributes.description:
* Increases the movement speed of enemies affected by [Aggress] by 5, but reduces their accuracy by 3% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Aggress: Getaway
attributes.description:
* Increases your movement speed by 30 for 1 second per attribute level after using [Aggress]

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Rampage: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rampage] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rampage: Havoc
attributes.description:
* 1% chance per attribute level of stunning enemies hit by [Rampage]

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Rampage: Don't Stop Me
attributes.description:
* Grants immunity against all removable debuffs whie using [Rampage]

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Bully: Endure
attributes.description:
* Immunity to knockback/knockdown while using [Bully]

* Reduces duration of [Bully] to 20 seconds

* Duration increased at every successful evasion fixed to 2 seconds and cooldown applied as 5 seconds when used with the [Bully: Endless Torment] attribute

attributes.name: [Arts] Rampage: Lawlessness
attributes.description: * Adds the [Ice] property to [Rampage], and enemies hit after using the skill are knocked down or become [Frozen] for 2 seconds.

attributes.name: [Arts] Throw Sand: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Throw Sand] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Brick Smash: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Brick Smash] by 1.25% per attribute level
